holdings.infoBox: KSA is an equity ETF with a total of 228 individual holdings.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Saudi Arabia ETF (KSA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Saudi Arabia IMI 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Saudi Arabian firms covering 99% of the market cap spectrum. KSA was launched on Sep 16, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Saudi-backed Riyadh Air wins approval to operate US flights
data.text: Saudi Arabia's new airline Riyadh Air won the right ​to operate flights to and from the United States, ‌the U.S. Transportation Department said in an order Tuesday.

data.title: UAE's exit from OPEC not directed against anyone, ADNOC CEO says
data.text: The United Arab Emirates' decision to exit OPEC and OPEC+ was not directed against ​anyone but meant to serve national interests, Abu Dhabi National ‌Oil Company CEO Sultan Al Jaber said on Monday.

data.title: CNBC Daily Open: UAE leaves OPEC adrift
data.text: The United Arab Emirates will exit OPEC on May 1. European bank earnings top forecasts, but Airbus misses expectations.

data.title: UAE Energy Minister explains decision to leave OPEC as Hormuz crisis deepens
